title: diastatea costaricensis
intro: Diastatea costaricensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to Costa Rica. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its chemical composition. The health benefits of Diastatea costaricensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, treat wounds, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Diastatea costaricensis is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
